rubric: 1-5 overall: clear, clinically correct, requests missing info, professional tone.

ratings.notes: Lists missing fields clearly; could be more specific about documentation needed.
Professional tone; mentions required criteria gaps.
Acceptable but generic; does not name all missing fields.
Clear ask for additional chart documentation.
Requests info but light on clinical specifics.
Appropriate follow-up language for missing A1C context.
Adequate but could cite payer criteria more directly.
Held-out case; clear request for missing migraine documentation.
